description: A starter page plugin that shows an anchored action for selected text and imports a prompt into Cerebr.

en.selection_helper.name: Selection Helper Template
en.selection_helper.description: A starter page plugin that shows an anchored action for selected text and imports a prompt into Cerebr.
en.selection_helper.import_prompt:
Please explain the selected text and extract the key points:

$1

zh-CN.selection_helper.name: 选区助手模板
zh-CN.selection_helper.description: 一个页面插件起步模板：在选中文本旁显示锚定按钮，并把提示词导入 Cerebr。
zh-CN.selection_helper.action_title: 让 Cerebr 解释这段选中文本
zh-CN.selection_helper.import_prompt:
请解释下面选中的文本，并提取关键要点：

$1
